summary: Bug fix verified: Manual trip entry form now saves correctly. The fix changed onClick={handleSaveManualTrip} to onClick={() => handleSaveManualTrip()} to prevent the click event from being passed as formData parameter. All 10 frontend E2E tests and 9 backend tests pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual trip entry bug fix verified. The form now correctly saves trips when user enters miles and selects purpose. YTD summary updates correctly after manual trip is saved. All GPS Mileage Tracker functionality is working as expected.

BUG-FIX-001.description: Manual trip entry form was showing 'Please enter the miles driven' error even when miles were entered
BUG-FIX-001.root_cause: onClick={handleSaveManualTrip} was passing the click event as formData parameter, causing validation to fail because event.miles is undefined
BUG-FIX-001.fix_applied: Changed to onClick={() => handleSaveManualTrip()} to ensure null is passed and the internal state (manualTripData) is used correctly

verification.manual_trip_save: PASS - Trip logged successfully with correct miles and tax deduction
verification.ytd_summary_update: PASS - Summary updates correctly after manual trip is saved

BUG-FIX-001.test_added: gps-mileage-tracker.spec.ts::Manual Trip Entry Bug Fix (BUG-FIX-001)::Manual trip entry saves correctly without 'Please enter the miles driven' error

manual_trip_entry_form.details: Form opens, has date/miles/purpose fields, save button enables when filled, saves correctly

ytd_summary_update.details: YTD summary updates after manual trip is saved

gps_mileage_tracker_display.details: Displays correct trip count and miles after manual entry
